documentation_impact.rationale: This task updates feature documentation, stage artifacts, compliance descriptors/tests, and glossary guidance, so documentation/reference impact applies.

deferred_items.rationale: Citation-verifier abbreviated prefix comparison remains an explicitly deferred companion feature in the ratified spec/delivery artifacts.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Ship-stage execution stayed at the human gate: no pan advance, no commit, no push, and required validation plus policy artifact generation were completed locally.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Documentation and reference stewardship obligations were satisfied by recording validation outcomes and canonical JSON formatting for ship-stage artifacts.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Feature-delivery ship gate validation is green; local diff review and human ratification remain before pan advance.
